title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Nami, Robin, Raizo, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Toko as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: O-Nami! Shinobu! Bonekichi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry! They found me! I've confirmed at least 11 Ninjas inside the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: WHAT-?! they found you, Robin?!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: 11 NINJAS?!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: We're your bodyguards, O-Robi! Confirm your location!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi's oniwaban, led by fuckurokuji, are quite skilled.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Oh no! They found you, O-Robi?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to think I'd finally been assigned something other than gathering food...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! Lord Orochi is in the middle of his banquet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not disturb him! This is but one rat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Ooh! Newcomer! O-Robi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where did you go? Come here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Hide a leaf in the forest," as they say. I can't escape now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is much I have left to do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for being so late, my LORD...()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are many things I, too, would wish to discuss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A lovely thing you are. It pleases me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gufufu! Do you also wish to become my consort?

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Gufuka Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're such a meanie, my lord!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Guhoho! Don't Sulk, Komura- Saki!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're lovely, too! So lovely!')

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't suppose you've heard of Komuraski's other side, Lord Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her good looks let her get away with everything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: SU...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Hm? Is something the matter, O-Robi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ER... no.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Shogun, I am quite interested in Onigashima.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: OH? That island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, my! So beau- Tiful!:)

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: COURTESAN KOMURA- SAKI!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm quite jealous of him, but I'm too scared of the other side of that woman to get involved with her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gahahaha! Don't worry! She won't fall for you anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That woman came from your brothels, boss Kyoshiro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You sure do tame them well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't speak of women as dogs or pets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "People are flowers." If your water was pure,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yours would bloom well, too.

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Wahahaha! You got me there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I heard that you sent out some of Kaido's Fiercest today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ruling with an iron fist!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You see, for us Yakuza...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: doesn't matter what sort of lowlife you are; if you drink with us, you're family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What'd you do if you came home

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To find your child beaten to a pulp?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your chivalry is admirable, boss.

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Indeed, Kyoshiro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy must always be crushed with overwhelming strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Flattened so they may never rise again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even if they are ghosts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lowlife or not, do not look lightly upon this situation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None from the capital would so lightly lay hands on a member of the kyoshiro family.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: An outsider has snuck into the capital!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
